summary: Iteration 19 - Dropbox Integration Testing Complete. All backend endpoints verified: GET /api/integrations/status (returns google_drive, dropbox, onedrive status), GET /api/integrations/dropbox/connect (307 redirect to Dropbox OAuth), DELETE /api/integrations/dropbox/disconnect (success), POST /api/integrations/dropbox/attach (validates card_id and file_id), GET /api/integrations/dropbox/files (401 when not connected), GET /api/integrations/dropbox/callback (handles error param with redirect). Frontend verified: Integrations page shows 3 cards (Google Drive Connect, OneDrive Coming Soon, Dropbox Connect), Card detail modal has 'Google Drive' and 'Dropbox' attachment buttons, Dropbox file picker shows 'not connected' state with 'Go to Integrations' button, Attachment display shows Dropbox icon for Dropbox-sourced attachments.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/integrations/status returns status for google_drive, onedrive, dropbox
Backend: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/connect returns 307 redirect to Dropbox OAuth
Backend: DELETE /api/integrations/dropbox/disconnect returns success message
Backend: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/files returns 401 when not connected
Backend: POST /api/integrations/dropbox/attach requires card_id (400 if missing)
Backend: POST /api/integrations/dropbox/attach requires file_id (400 if missing)
Backend: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/callback handles error param (redirects to /integrations?error=X)
Backend: POST /api/integrations/dropbox/attach works with valid card (returns 401 when not connected)
Backend: GET /api/integrations/status returns all three providers with correct structure
Frontend: Integrations page (/integrations) loads correctly
Frontend: Google Drive card displayed with Connect button (enabled)
Frontend: OneDrive card displayed with 'Coming Soon' badge and disabled button
Frontend: Dropbox card displayed with Connect button (enabled)
Frontend: Dropbox Connect button is clickable and initiates OAuth flow
Frontend: Card detail modal has 'Google Drive' attachment button
Frontend: Card detail modal has 'Dropbox' attachment button
Frontend: Dropbox file picker opens when clicking 'Dropbox' button
Frontend: Dropbox file picker shows 'Dropbox not connected' message when not connected
Frontend: Dropbox file picker has 'Go to Integrations' button
Frontend: Attachment display shows Dropbox icon for Dropbox-sourced attachments
Frontend: Attachment display shows 'DROPBOX' label for Dropbox files
Frontend: Login and board navigation work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Dropbox OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch error is expected - preview URL not configured in Dropbox App Console (as noted in agent context)
All Dropbox integration endpoints properly protected with authentication
Dropbox file picker correctly handles 'not connected' state with user-friendly message and link to Integrations page
Dropbox attachments display with correct icon and 'DROPBOX' label in card detail modal
Backend properly validates card_id and file_id for attach endpoint
seed_data_creation: TEST_Dropbox_Document.pdf attachment created on card_da16e8e57260 during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified Dropbox integration features. Key implementations: 1) Backend endpoints at /api/integrations/dropbox/* for connect, callback, files, attach, disconnect. 2) Frontend IntegrationsPage.js shows 3 integration cards - Google Drive (Connect), OneDrive (Coming Soon), Dropbox (Connect). 3) DropboxFilePicker.js component handles file browsing and 'not connected' state. 4) CardDetailModal.js has 'Google Drive' and 'Dropbox' buttons in attachments section. 5) Dropbox OAuth won't complete in preview env due to redirect_uri not configured in Dropbox App Console. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_dropbox_integration.py

integrations_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/status returns google_drive, onedrive, dropbox connection status

dropbox_connect_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/connect returns 307 redirect to Dropbox OAuth with proper scopes

dropbox_disconnect_endpoint.details: DELETE /api/integrations/dropbox/disconnect removes integration and returns success

dropbox_files_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/files returns 401 when not connected (expected behavior)

dropbox_attach_endpoint.details: POST /api/integrations/dropbox/attach validates card_id and file_id, returns 401 when not connected

dropbox_callback_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/dropbox/callback handles error param and redirects to /integrations?error=X

integrations_page_ui.details: Shows 3 cards: Google Drive (Connect button), OneDrive (Coming Soon disabled), Dropbox (Connect button)

dropbox_file_picker_ui.details: Opens from card detail modal, shows 'Dropbox not connected' state with 'Go to Integrations' button

card_detail_dropbox_button.details: 'Dropbox' button present in card detail modal attachments section

dropbox_attachment_display.details: Dropbox attachments show Dropbox icon and 'DROPBOX' label in card detail modal

login_and_dashboard.details: Login with admin credentials and board navigation work correctly
